title: Hiro's Animal Friends Love Food
synopsis: Baby Hiro discovers what his animal friends love to eat in this delightful food adventure filled with colorful treats and happy animals.

pages.text: Meet Hiro! He loves to eat yummy food. Today, Hiro wants to share food with his animal friends.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sits at a colorful picnic table covered with magical sparkling fruits, steaming vegetables, and delicious treats with exaggerated proportions and appetizing visual appeal
illustration.alt: Hiro sitting at a magical picnic table with colorful food

pages.text: Bunny hops over! 'Carrots!' says Hiro. Bunny munches the orange carrots. Crunch, crunch! So good!

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face offering giant sparkling orange carrots to a fluffy white bunny, with magical steam and glittering effects around the appetizing vegetables
illustration.alt: Hiro feeding magical carrots to a happy bunny

pages.text: Cat comes next! 'Fish!' says Hiro. Cat licks the shiny fish. Yum, yum! Cat purrs happily.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face presenting a glistening, steaming fish with sparkles to an orange tabby cat in a feast celebration scene with exaggerated proportions
illustration.alt: Hiro giving a magical fish to a purring cat

pages.text: Bear walks up! 'Honey!' says Hiro. Bear tastes the golden honey. Drip, drip! Sweet and sticky!

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face holding a jar of golden honey that drips with magical sparkles while a brown bear enjoys the delicious appetizing treat with steam effects
illustration.alt: Hiro sharing magical honey with a friendly bear

pages.text: Monkey swings down! 'Banana!' says Hiro. Monkey peels the yellow banana. So tasty! Everyone is happy eating together.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face surrounded by all the animals in a joyful feast celebration with magical bananas, sparkling food, and delicious treats creating a scene of food joy
illustration.alt: Hiro and all animal friends enjoying a magical feast together

metadata.illustrationStyle: delicious appetizing food, exaggerated proportions, steam drips sparkles, magical food, diverse cuisines, feast celebration, cooking scenes, yummy visual, food joy

questions.question: What does Bunny like to eat?
questions.explanation: Bunny loves to munch on crunchy orange carrots!

questions.question: What does Cat enjoy eating?
questions.explanation: Cat loves to lick the shiny fish that Hiro shares!

questions.question: What makes Bear happy to eat?
questions.explanation: Bear loves the sweet, sticky golden honey!
